name: Cool Silk Purple
description: Silky royal purples wrapped in midnight glass.
author: Touch Down Hosting

colors.background: radial-gradient(1200px 800px at 85% -10%, rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.15), transparent 60%), radial-gradient(1000px 700px at -10% 110%, rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.09), transparent 55%), linear-gradient(160deg, #0a070d 0%, #130f1c 55%, #0d0812 100%)
